Sound White Noise Machine with 36 Soothing Sounds and Night Lights Sound Machines with Memory

I love this sound machine! there are 6 buttons and each button has 6 sounds for a full 36 sounds! You have fans, wind, water, outdoor, white noise and 5 lullabies or baby womb heartbeat. The light has a cool feature too. It doesn't change colors but it is like it breathes! It goes dim, then out, and then turns on again - like it's breathing Very easy to operate. The volume control works great too! There are 30, 60 or 90 minutes timers. The unit will automatically shut off after this time. Love this machine. 5 stars! Hope you find this review and pictures helpful!
AHGIDR4IJFS23Q4GTZ33FI5LYDSQ_1.best_prediction_review:
Current price $19.99.

We wanted a simple sound machine for bedtime (and honestly for those nights when the whole house is just… noisy). This one has a lot of options — 36 sounds plus a night light — and the memory function is the reason I’m keeping it. Once you find the sound/volume you like, it comes back on exactly the same the next night, so you’re not fumbling around in the dark trying to recreate the setting.

The sounds we’ve used so far (white noise and a couple of the fan/rain type ones) are soothing and steady, and it gets loud enough to cover hallway noise without sounding harsh or “tinny” at our normal volume. The 60 minute timer is also handy when you don’t want it running all night.

The night light is a nice bonus for a bedroom/kids room situation — soft enough to not be distracting, but helpful if you need to get up and not turn on a bright lamp. Buttons are straightforward and it’s been easy for everyone in the house to use without me re-explaining it.

4 stars! Hope you find this review helpful! If you buy it, the first quick test I’d do is set your preferred sound + volume + light, turn it off, and make sure it actually remembers it the next time you power it back on — that’s what makes it low-fuss for daily use.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: Heated Eyelash Curler for Women,4 Temperature Modes,10s Heating Mini Electric Eyelash Curler,USB Rechargeable,Lash Curlers Suitable for Long eyelashes, Short eyelashes (01)
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text: I have pretty long lashes so figured this would be worth a shot but honestly it doesn't seem to make an different from a regular curler and good mascara. It seems to be of decent quality, the controls are easy to use and the display easy to read, but it does lose its charge fast - you literally have to charge it after every use - which for the length of time it is used seems a bit inconvenient.  Fun as a gadget but not one that will be added to my regular set,
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
This little heated lash curler is actually useful, not just a gimmick. It heats up fast (around the 10 seconds it claims) and I like having the temperature settings because I can start low and only bump it up if my lashes are being stubborn. Compared to my regular clamp curler it’s quicker and I’m not pinching or tugging at my lid, and the curl looks more natural.

The make-or-break for me with these is whether they hold up to real, repetitive use and whether charging turns into “one more thing to babysit.” So far it’s been reliable (no random shut-offs mid-use), and it charges easily with USB, but I will say I wish the battery lasted longer between charges because if you forget to plug it in you’re back to a manual curler.

It works best if you treat it like a finishing tool after mascara (lightly, and let it set a second). Also, I’d say it’s a better fit for average/longer lashes — my lashes are on the longer side and it reaches them fine, but on shorter lashes you have to be more careful with placement or you won’t catch much.

Overall it does the main job and saves me time, but the charging cadence is the only thing keeping it from being a clear “replace forever” item for me.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: Crystal Hair Eraser, Hairo Magic Crystal Hair Eraser, Painless Leg Hair Removal for Women Silky Hair Removal Eraser Exfoliator Tool for Men & Women (Black)
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text:
What you get - 1 crystal hair remover

Pros - you literally just need water - no soap, just water and this. There are no sharp edges so you are not likely to injure yourself using it.

Cons - It doesn't work anywhere that the hair is short but it does kinda work eventually if the hair is longer. The trouble is you really have to keep going over and over the same area and the results aren't that great. It is time consuming and if you keep rubbing it will mark up the skin. I will stick to a razer.

Overall - an expensive gadget that isn't worth it.
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
This does remove hair, but it is definitely not the “one quick swipe and you’re done” magic tool the pictures make it seem like. For me it only worked decently when the hair had a bit of length to it (not just stubble), and it takes a lot of small circular rubbing to get an even patch.

That rubbing is the dealbreaker. If I keep the pressure light it takes forever, and if I press harder to speed it up my skin gets red and irritated really fast. It also leaves me feeling kind of “raw” like I over-exfoliated, so this isn’t something I’d use right before going out, and I wouldn’t go near sensitive areas with it.

Convenience-wise it’s not really saving me any steps compared to a basic razor (which is still faster and more predictable), and because I have to be careful and go slow it ends up being more work, not less. For the price I don’t think it earns a spot in my routine — it’s usable in a pinch, but I won’t be replacing it when it’s gone.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: JJ CARE Gauze Rolls [Pack of 30], 4” x 4.5 Yards Flexible Gauze Bandage Roll, Individually Packed Rolled Gauze, Breathable Gauze Wrap for Wounds, with Medical Tape
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text:
What you get - 30 individually wrapped gauze rolls, 1 roll of medical tape.

Pros - these are definitely an inexpensive option and they work well for wrapping OVER a sterile dressing or holding a STERILE dressing in place. They are clearly marked as NOT STERILE which is probably the reason the cost is a little less.

Cons - They are a little rougher than some of the other brands and you need to use a little more to get them to hold well.

Overall - you get what you pay for. They work well for wrapping over dressings - and even though you have to use a little more - you get more for your money so it evens out.
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
What you get - 30 individually wrapped gauze rolls (4” x 4.5 yards) plus a roll of medical tape.

Pros - I like that each roll is sealed on its own because it’s easy to stash a few in the bathroom cabinet and a few in the car without the whole thing turning into one handled-up roll. The weave is breathable and it wraps fine around a wrist/ankle without needing a complicated technique. The tape included is handy for finishing it off.

Cons - These are NOT sterile, so for me they’re only for holding things in place (or over an actual sterile pad), not for putting straight on a fresh wound. Also, the gauze is on the thinner side so on anything bigger you do end up using more layers than you think.

Overall - for the price and the count it still balances out because you’re getting a lot of rolls, and it’s convenient having them individually packed. I’d buy again for first aid kits / wrapping and securing, but if you specifically need sterile gauze this isn’t it.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: hellowater Defense – Toxin Overload Defense (Blood Orange – Fortify) – Immunity Aid – 0 Sugar – 0 Carbs – 0 Calories – Nothing Artificial – Low Glycemic – 16 Fl. oz. Bottles (Pack of 12)
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text: I had the blood orange flavor and blood orange is a favorite of mine in general - but this was more like just regular orange -and kinda artificial tasting. I mean there is only so much flavor I feel you are ever going to get from something that has zero everything but the biggest downside for me would be the price. There is no way I can justify that price with all the benefits it lists. I just don't see it being accurate. As an alternative to plain water - and because I got to sample them through the vine program - they will all get drunk- but they won't be replaced when they are gone.
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
What you get is 12 bottles (16 oz each) of hellowater “Defense” in the Blood Orange flavor.

I’m not really sold on the whole “toxin overload defense / immunity aid” claim list, and at this price point it reads more like marketing than something you can actually count on. My test was simpler: does it taste like blood orange (not just generic orange / artificial), and would I actually choose it over just drinking water or grabbing a cheaper flavored sparkling drink.

To me the flavor is more regular orange than true blood orange, and it has that “functional drink” taste in the background that I don’t love. It’s not undrinkable, but it also isn’t something I found myself craving, which matters because if it doesn’t taste good you won’t keep reaching for it.

Because of that, I don’t think it’s a good value unless you already know you like this exact taste and you’re buying it as a no-sugar flavored drink. I’ll finish them, but I wouldn’t repurchase expecting the label benefits, and I wouldn’t pay this much just for the flavor.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: Miss.Mafa Rose Quartz Gua Sha Scraping Massage Tool Set for Home and SPA - Natural Jade Face Massager, Improve Skin Health, Travel-Friendly (Pack of 3)
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text: This set has a a full collection of gua sha stones all made from actual rose quartz and a decent size. It comes in a kit complete with a little silk pouch and a silk eye mask which makes it perfect for gifting. The stones are all excellent quality and well finished to their shapes making it a win for me!
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
This is a solid little gua sha set mainly because it’s actually ready to use and the stones I got were smooth and nicely finished (no chips, no rough seams, no weird coating). You get 3 pieces in the box and the shapes are different enough that it doesn’t feel like 3 duplicates.

I’m not going to pretend I can “measure” any big skin-change claims from a tool like this, but as a basic scraping/massage stone it does what it’s supposed to do without hurting or snagging, and it feels good with a little facial oil. The edges on mine are rounded enough that I’m not worried about accidentally digging in if I’m half-asleep using it.

Packaging was simple but it arrived intact and clean, and it would be fine as a small gift since it’s a complete set and not just one random stone.

Overall it’s a good buy if you want a simple 3-pack that’s smooth and usable right out of the box. If you’re buying purely for dramatic “before/after” promises, I can’t certify that from my use.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: 3 Pieces Happy Halloween Wooden Table Decorations
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text: These are cute additions to my Halloween decorations this year. I like that they are made of wood so will be able to be kept for future years too. They come in a flat pack and you just have to slot the signs in their holders - the only thing is they don't stay in if you move them (I guess you could glue them in if you really wanted to) - but for the most part when they are just sitting on the table etc they look fab. Bright colors - very festive!
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
What you get - 3 small wooden Halloween tabletop signs/decorations.

They’re cute for a quick seasonal touch on a shelf, tiered tray, or even a bathroom counter. The colors on mine matched the photos and the printing was clean (no smears), and I didn’t get any weird strong smell when I opened the package.

The only real issue for me is stability. They’re very lightweight and if you bump the table or have kids/pets, they can slide or tip easier than I expected. If you want them to stay put for the whole season, you’ll probably end up using a tiny bit of double-sided tape or a dot of glue. Once I did that, they were fine.

Overall: nice little accents, just don’t expect them to be sturdy on their own if they’re going somewhere that gets touched/moved around.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: Wicca Witch Herbs and Crystals for Witchcraft Supplies Kit, 53p Wiccan Supplies and Tools, Dried Herbs and Flowers for Rituals Spells, Magical Witch Kit for Wiccan Altar, Metaphysical Witchy Gifts
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text: As of when I type this the product is showing as "currently unavailable" and this makes me really sad. This is the prefect gift for a beginner just wanting to start looking into the craft (although the info sheet is super small and basic so you might want to add a book or 2), or as a kit for someone (or yourself) that is already in the craft because this is a great little kit. Great selection of herbs, mini crystals (for spells / bags - you don't see this very often) - and a set of full size chakra stones, all in a giftable box. Really hope that they make this available again soon!
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
This is a big mixed kit of little packets/jars of dried herbs/flowers with some small crystals and a few altar-style extras. The “treasure box” feeling is real when you open it, and mine arrived neatly packed so it’s actually giftable (nothing was loose or spilled in the box).

Just be aware this is basically supplies, not guidance. If you’re buying it for a beginner, there aren’t really instructions or a booklet that tells you what to do with each herb/crystal, so you’ll need to already know what you’re doing or be willing to look things up. For me that’s fine because I wanted a variety of items to have on hand, but I wouldn’t call it a complete ready-to-go starter kit in the sense of “open it and do your first ritual/spell.”

Quality-wise the herbs looked and smelled like what they’re supposed to (not musty, not crushed into dust), and having everything separated into its own little container/pouch makes it easier to store without making a mess. Overall it’s a fun, well-packed assortment, just don’t buy it expecting it to teach you or walk you through anything.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: EYEKESHE Aromatherapy Shower Steamers Gifts for Women, Unique Gifts Shower Bombs with Pure Essential Oils for Birthday, Home Spa Stress Relief, Bathtub, Shower Melts and Self Care
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text: Not having a bathtub in the house these shower steamers are fabulous. Made with essential oils they smell fabulous and before using them I actually just opened the box and had it sitting in the cupboard with the towels because they smell so great. They totally dissolve and even though they have what looks like little bits of paper in them it all dissolves easily and doesn't stain or mark our white shower floor. Love them! The Lavender and Lemon are my favorite - but all the scents are very pleasant and different enough that there should be a favorite for everyone.
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
These are the little shower steamers you drop on the shower floor to scent the steam (not for washing your body). The smell is actually really nice right out of the box, and once the water hits one it starts working pretty quickly and makes the whole bathroom smell more “spa” than “bathroom,” which is really what I wanted from these.

My main test with shower bombs is whether they give you noticeable scent without having to babysit them, and whether they dissolve cleanly instead of leaving a weird gritty mess you have to scrub off the tub. These did a good job on both for me: I could actually smell the essential oils while I was in there, and after the shower I wasn’t left with a bunch of residue to clean up.

They’re strong enough that you can smell them before you even use them, so they also kind of earn their keep just sitting in the box until you’re ready for a shower. If you’re expecting something that lasts forever in a long shower you may go through them faster than you think, but for a quick stress-relief shower they did what they’re supposed to do and I’d use them again.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: Ultra Clarity Eyeglass Cleaning Wipes - 30 Pack | Safe for Use on All Coated Lenses and Electonic Screens
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text: These seem like maybe at one point they would have been great wipes, but they seemed to have dried out. If they were designed that way then that's a flaw because to get a really good clear I had to use a spray with them and that kinda defeats the object of ready to go wipes. That being said the mini clothes clean the extra spray off really well - which is why I didn't rate it a 1 star but definitely not something I would use.
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
I really wanted these to be a true grab-and-go wipe for glasses and my phone screen, but the packets are too inconsistent to trust. Some wipes are nicely wet and do a good job with fingerprints/smudges with just a quick pass, but I opened too many that felt almost dry right away, and then you’re stuck rubbing and buffing like you’re using a dry tissue.

For something that’s supposed to be convenient, having to hunt for a “good” packet (or needing to grab a spray to finish the job) kind of defeats the whole point of buying individually wrapped wipes. When you get a properly saturated one it works fine, but I won’t be replacing these because I need them to work the same every time.

AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.product_description: Loofah Back Scrubber, Loofah Sponge with Long Wooden Handle for Shower for Men Women Exfoliating Luffa Bath Sponges for Body & Back, Bamboo Charcoal Infused
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.review_text: This is a great set and both loofahs seem to be very good quality (they don't start to come undone like some of the cheaper ones can). The only thing would be that the handle could do with being a little bit longer. For me being short - it wasn't an issue but it wouldn't have worked for my husband.
AGFAOH3NMW2D7YV3QVZSTXMTSKIQ.best_prediction_review:
This is basically a loofah on a long wooden handle (this one is marketed as bamboo charcoal infused). The handle length is the whole reason I bought it, and it passes the only test that matters for me: I can actually reach the middle of my back without doing shoulder gymnastics, and it doesn’t feel like it’s going to snap when you put a little pressure on it.

The loofah itself has enough texture to exfoliate without feeling like sandpaper, and it lathers up fine with a normal body wash. The head has stayed attached so far even when I’m using it at an angle, which is what usually kills these long-handle scrubbers.

Only real downside is it’s a little bulky to store in a smaller shower, and like any loofah you do want to rinse it well and let it dry between uses. Overall though, it does what it’s supposed to do and feels sturdier than the cheap plastic handled ones I’ve tried.

AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.product_description: Cranberry Gummies | 25,000mg | 110 Count | Vegan, Non-GMO, and Gluten Free Supplement | High Potency Extract Formula | by Horbaach
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.review_text:
And aesthetically pleasing with the molded-in bumps. The chewiness factor is right up there with the best -- the flavor is great. 25 grams of cranberry is packed into each gummy, the flavor, Cherry Mango is good -- I just wonder why not Cherry Cranberry or just plain Cranberry flavor. These gummies are sweet and tasty.
Taking three a day is reasonable, and pleasant. The ingredients all appear to be natural -- the sweeteners, Stevia and Erythritol appear to be safe.
There was a generous amount of these gummies in the large bottle, and so they lasted for quite some time. I enjoyed taking them and had no ill-effects
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.best_prediction_review:
I got these Horbaach Cranberry Gummies mainly because I’m more likely to actually take a gummy than deal with big pills, and these are genuinely pleasant to eat. They’re nicely chewy with a clean “bite” (not gritty, not sticky-to-your-teeth), and the cranberry taste is tart-sweet enough that it doesn’t feel like you’re forcing down a supplement.

For me the safety/trust gate on things like this is the label/ingredient reality, and I like that they’re vegan, non-GMO, and gluten free. I’m also picky about gummies that leave a weird aftertaste or upset my stomach from the sweeteners, and these have been easy for me to tolerate.

The bottle is a generous count, so you’re getting a lot of servings for the price, and that matters with something you’ll restock. If you want cranberry support but you know you won’t stay consistent with capsules, these are an easy “yes” just on taste/texture and practicality alone.

AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.product_description: Teeth Clean Tools Kit, OUZIGRT Teeth Whitening Kit For Home & Pet Oral Use
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.review_text:
This set of OUZIGRT Calculus Remover Dentist Hygiene Instruments comes in a very impressive portable hard shell case which is durable and easy to open (that also stays closed when closed) .
Scrapers, picks, magnifying glass, tweezers -- are well-balanced and they all fit nicely and dexterously in my hand.
I would feel a bit clumsy if I were using this on my pet (or myself, for that matter) because I would have no idea what to do and certainly would not want to hurt the little critter - or myself. But they certainly look like they are more than able, in the right hands, to effect a thorough dental examination.

However, I have a wonderful use for these very durable and well-made tools. I am an ardent model car builder -- and these picks make me very happy -- they are absolutely great at making little modifications, cutting extra pieces of scrap plastic from the edges or doors, cleaning up indentations, and the like. The length and the balance of each one of these tools make them predictable in tight places and very ergonomic. Once I'm done for the day, a little cleanup with a slightly damp rag, then a quick dry -- and everything goes back into the sturdy case, ready to be used over and over again.
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.best_prediction_review:
This OUZIGRT teeth clean tools kit is basically a small set of stainless-style dental picks/scrapers plus a tiny mirror, and it’s been genuinely handy for quick “I can feel something there” touch-ups at home. The tools feel rigid (not bendy), the tips are thin enough to get into tight spaces, and the mirror is small but usable if you have good light and a steady hand.
My quick pass/fail test was whether the tools could handle normal pressure without flexing and whether I could rinse/clean them easily and put them away ready for the next time. On both counts it passed: they rinse clean fast (I wash with hot water and soap and dry them right away), and the case keeps everything together so I’m not digging in a drawer for one loose piece. The zipper case also closes securely, so it feels “kit-ready” instead of spilling tools in a bag.
One caution: these are sharp precision tools, so I would not call this a casual “whitening kit” in the way the listing title suggests. It’s more like a basic set of dental cleaning tools for careful, controlled use. If you’re comfortable using picks and want something sturdy that cleans up easily and stores neatly, this is a good little set for the price.

AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.product_description: Framar Powder Free Disposable Gloves, Black Nitrile Gloves 100 Pk, Hair Dye Gloves, Black Gloves Disposable Latex Free, Cleaning Gloves, Plastic gloves, Latex Free Gloves Nitrile – Mechanic Gloves, Latex Gloves Medium
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.review_text:
I love these Framar Powder Free Disposable Gloves, Black Nitrile Gloves. Over the past year I have worn hundreds of gloves to protect my hands during the pandemic. These Framar gloves are by far the strongest most comfortable ones. I wear a Medium -- these medium gloves fit my hands like a second skin. When I use them at home, I can wash them in hot water and soap (my choice) take them off carefully and reuse them the next day (but not when I wear them outside - they are one use, then).
I get a better "feel" of what I'm handing when I wear these gloves. They are so strong that unlike some of my other gloves, they do not tear when I try to remove them.
They are expensive -- about 8 or 9 dollars more per box than the other brands I have used. But if I have the money and the choice, I will DEFINITELY get these.
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.best_prediction_review:
These Framar black nitrile gloves are a solid disposable glove that feels a lot more substantial than the thin, plasticky food-prep type. I’ve used them for hair dye, general bathroom cleaning, and a couple greasy household tasks and they held up well without instantly tearing at the fingertips when I pinched or stretched them on.
The main test for me is whether they rip when you pull them OFF (especially when your hands are damp or you’ve got cleaner on them), and these have been good about that—no annoying mid-removal splits. The nitrile has a nice “grab” to it so I can handle slippery bottles and tools without feeling like I’m going to drop them.
Fit-wise, Medium worked for me and also for a family member with slightly larger hands, which is not always the case with box-store mediums. They’re not so tight that they stress at the webbing, but still give decent fingertip feel for doing detailed work like applying dye around the hairline.
They’re not the cheapest per glove, but because they don’t fail halfway through a task (and I can sometimes rinse and re-use one pair for an at-home cleaning session), the 100 count goes further than you’d think. I’d buy these again for messy jobs where I want real tear resistance and decent tactile control.

AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.product_description: GreenFist Hydrogen Peroxide Ready to Use All Purpose (Glass, Carpet,Stain Remover) Cleaner (1 Gallon)
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.review_text:
Smells great (orange oil) , sprays a wide swath, and this formula really takes the dirt off!! I used 1/ 2 a bottle along with a ton of wipes, to clean off a filthy outdoor slide-down metal storage unit door (management never delivered on its promise to powerwash this door and it was "health-risk filthy"). The spray bottle coverage immediately emulsified and dislodged the filth, the wipes ended up black, the slide down door now looks as good as new.
Will I buy this again!! Yes yes yes!! I am downsizing my huge apartment and GreenFist's cleaning powerand the germicidal properties of hyudrogen peroxide will be very much appreciated.
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.best_prediction_review:
I keep hydrogen peroxide around for the usual household stuff, but the only thing I cared about with this 1-gallon GreenFist was whether it can break up truly nasty grime fast enough to be worth owning.

My quick proof test was a “health-risk filthy” job: a plastic kitchen trash can that had that sticky mystery film inside plus a couple old splatters that had basically become part of the surface. I sprayed it straight (no mixing), let it sit a minute or two, then wiped. The first set of paper towels came up noticeably dark/black and the film started lifting instead of just smearing around. I did a second pass and the inside went back to looking like clean plastic without me having to scrub until my arms were tired.

It also took care of a dried-on drip on tile and brightened a light stain line in a sink, but the trash can test is what sold me because that’s where most cleaners either do nothing or require heavy scrubbing. Smell is mild/clean (not perfumey), and I didn’t have any irritation using it with gloves like I normally do.

It’s a full gallon so you’re set for a while, and for me that’s the value here: it actually moves grime in real life, so I’ll keep this around and re-buy when I run out.

AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.product_description: Daarcin 3 Sizes 60pcs Mixed Resealable Foil Pouch Smell Proof Bags,Mylar Ziplock Food Bags for Daily Life Storage
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.review_text:
These bags are Heavy Duty -- I put them to good use immediately!! They all stay together in one big storage envelope until needed -- they are good looking, zip closed securely, and the silvery backing showcases the contents very well. They are strong and keep their flat shape as long as you don't over-stuff them.
They are worth the expensse because I think they will last me a good long time, used or unused.
They are so flat that I am able to put the ones I have filled-- into my file cabinet where I can easily find them when I need them.
And although I have not yet used them for food I feel secure in the fact that whatever I put inside (dried beans, dry rice, dried herbs) will be protected and air won't be able to get in.
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.best_prediction_review:
These Daarcin resealable foil pouches are sturdier than I expected, and the first pass/fail for me was the zipper: it closes cleanly and re-opens without that “one-and-done” feel. AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.product_description: KORESELECT Wellness - Blood Circulation Supplements, 100% Vegan, Korean Red Panax Ginseng Extract, Dietary Herbal Supplement for Men & Women, Stress Relief, Immune System Support - 45 Softgels Pills

AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.best_prediction_review:
These KORESELECT Wellness softgels have been easy for me to work into a daily routine — I keep the bottle near the coffee mugs and take one with breakfast. The softgels are small and go down smoothly, and I haven’t had any stomach upset.

AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.product_description: Vegan Organic Apple Cider Vinegar Gummies Vitamins by Clever Life Rx, Dietary Supplement - Raw, Unfiltered Healthy Detox & Weight, Support Immunity Gummy (60 Count with The Mother) B9, B12 Cranberry
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.review_text:
When I first tried a gummy I said to myself -- "Needs more YUM!" because it was not as sweet as I thought it would be. But after a few days I found the taste to be tolerably enjoyable- certainly MUCH better than the organic apple cider vinegar I usually use-- and without that yukky "mother" floating around in the bottle. The beet root and cranberry also adds to AC vinergar's detoxing properties. I take it first thing in the morning so there's no taste clash or interaction with what I've just eaten.
Personally I dont think that just one gummy is as effectve as the liquid, but I'm not worried because I still add a litlle liquid AC Vinegar to my dailiy meals/drinks.
The bottle size and the gummy size make it perfect for me to take when I travel. Thr price is reasonable as the supply provided is generous
AHIILRF3CJGYF3LXJSE4EVAIP7TA.best_prediction_review:
These apple cider vinegar gummies are a nice way to get the “ACV” idea without the burn you get from drinking vinegar. The flavor is more cranberry-forward than vinegar (I don’t taste much vinegar at all), and the texture is pleasantly chewy without sticking to my teeth. I’ve been taking them daily and they’re easy to remember since it feels like a little treat rather than a chore.
Ingredient-wise, I like that they’re vegan and include “with the mother,” plus the added B9/B12. I still always wish brands would be extra-clear on the exact amounts and sugar content on the listing (since gummies can sneak in a lot of sugar), but based on the bottle I received it didn’t come across as anything weird or overly “chemical,” and I had no stomach upset from them.
As far as results, I don’t buy gummies as a true “detox,” but I do think they can be a helpful supplement if you’re trying to support routines (I mostly wanted something gentler for digestion and general wellness). Don’t expect a dramatic weight-loss effect from any gummy, but as an everyday vitamin-style add-on, these are pleasant enough that I’ll actually take them.
The bottle was a decent size for 60 gummies and the seal/packaging felt sturdy. Price-wise it feels fair if you’re comparing it to other ACV gummies with added vitamins, but if you’re strictly after vinegar benefits on a budget, liquid ACV is still cheaper — it’s just a lot harder to take consistently.

AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.product_description: Rinse Free Sponge Bath Wipes (30-pack) | Extra Large & Thick No Rinse Waterless Body Wipe Sponges - Disposable Shower Cleaning Wash Cloths for Kids Adults Surgery Elder Care Gym Travel & More (1 Pack)
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.review_text: When you can't get in the shower and want to feel refreshed or just clean these are really good to have around. Thick enough that you won't easily drive your fingers through the material but thin enough to be usable. Ok scent. Useful cloths.
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.best_prediction_review:
Picked these up for a rinse-free cleanup option (Florida heat + not always having the energy for a full shower). The main pass/fail for me is whether they hold together and feel usable, and these do. They’re extra large and thick, but not so thick that they feel like you’re rubbing yourself with a sponge brick. One wipe was plenty for a quick all-over wipe down and it didn’t shred, pill up, or fall apart while I was using it.

They feel soft enough on skin and didn’t leave me feeling tacky afterward. There is a scent, but it’s not overpowering and it didn’t linger in an annoying way. The pack has stayed sealed between uses and the wipes haven’t dried out on me so far, which is what usually makes these a waste. For a quick, low-effort clean up that you’ll actually use when you’re tired, these work and I’d buy them again.

AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.product_description: NatureWorks HydroMATE Electrolytes Powder Packets Hydration Accelerator Drink Mix Rapid Party Relief Recovery Vitamin C Orange Citrus 30 Count
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.review_text: Little packets resisted tearing open for me. I ended up needing scissors or a knife to easily open these. The flavor was okay. Seemed to help in hydrating the skin something I need a lot of help with. I've had better mix-ins and I've had worse.
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.best_prediction_review:
I bought these to keep around for hydration, and the one thing I can honestly judge is whether I stop feeling dried out later in the day. With these, I notice my skin doesn’t get that “dehydrated” feeling as bad after being out in the Florida heat and sweating.

Taste is fine for an orange/citrus packet (not amazing, not gross), and it goes down easy enough once it’s mixed. My main complaint is the packets themselves. They’re harder to tear open cleanly than they should be, and if you’re trying to do this in the car or when you’re already feeling rough, it’s an unnecessary mess/annoyance. If you’re okay opening them carefully with scissors at home it’s not a big deal, but as a grab-and-go thing they could be designed better.

Overall: the mix works for me for hydration and I’ll finish the box, but the packaging keeps it from being as convenient as it’s supposed to be.

AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.product_description: MEO Lite Reusable and Adjustable Face Mask | 2 Replaceable Filters | Washable, Fashionable, Sustainable, Comfortable | x 1 Medium, Black
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.review_text: Biggest issue I had with these, besides having to replace filters, was the very poor fit around my nose. No matter what I tried I constantly fogged up my glasses which was a huge pain.
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.best_prediction_review:
Bought this because I wanted a reusable mask that doesn’t turn into a wet rag in Florida heat and that I can wear with glasses without constant fog.

Fit is decent and the adjustable straps help, but the nose area is the make-or-break point for me. My quick test is simple: put it on, breathe normally for a few minutes, then look down and turn my head like I’m shopping. If my glasses fog, it’s not sealing where it needs to. With this one I still get enough fogging that I’m constantly messing with it, and that means I won’t keep reaching for it.

The fabric itself feels fine and it’s nice in theory that it’s washable and has replaceable filters, but none of that matters if the top edge won’t stay sealed on my face. I can make it “okay” for short trips, but I wouldn’t buy it again for regular use with glasses.

AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.product_description: New Silicone 3D Bracket for Comfortable Wearing by Creating More Space for Breathing Ideal Makeup Saver (3)
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.review_text:
I accept we need to wear masks in public. That's fine, I don't mind. I have some breathing issues (COPD) but I don't run around with fake notes from fake government sites trying to get away with not wearing a mask.
These seemed like a good idea for five or ten minutes then someone took a closer look. Other styles of these inserts have clips or hooks molded into them so they can easily be attached to the disposable paper style of mask. These inserts lack any means to hold them in place. You're expected to stuff this under your mask and wish or hope it stays in place. It won't, it's going to slide around while your mask goes another way. If you're lucky it won't pop out and fall to the ground.
Breathing while wearing a mask isn't fun. You can do it. Doctor's do it with much more restrictive masks for half a day or longer. but this insert. . . you're literally blocking off 50+% of the surface area inside the mask with plastic that blocks air flow. I sat quietly for five minutes trying this mask out, it became uncomfortably warm inside the mask. I started to sweat. When I tried to talk the insert slid about under my mask. I had to take this off. It was horrible. According to one of the product images in the listing This product will:

Realive you from the Bellow Problerms
• Mask Stick to Lipstick - Did not test, probably works.
• Not Breathing Smoothly - This hindered smooth breathing.
• Fogging of Glasses - If anything these worsen how badly glasses fog.
• Sultry Wearing a Mask - This insulates and blocks airflow. Hot & stuffy.

These were and are a terrible idea. I wouldn't recommend them to anyone. . . unless I really didn't like them.
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.best_prediction_review:
I wear glasses in the Florida heat and can get short of breath in a mask, so I tried these to keep the fabric off my mouth. Quick test for me was just walking around the house and talking while taking a few deeper breaths. They do make a little pocket of space so the mask isn’t stuck to your lips, and it helps some with makeup not getting rubbed off.

But they don’t stay put for me, and that’s the whole problem. There’s no real retention (no clip/lock/etc.), so once I start moving and talking they shift around and I end up messing with my mask more, which defeats the point. If you need something that’s hands-off and predictable—especially if breathing/airflow is already a concern—these were more hassle than help for me. Might work for someone with a tighter mask fit, but I wouldn’t repurchase.

AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.product_description: Cocohoney 3 Ply Disposable Protective Face Mask (Non-Medical) Black 50PCS
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.review_text: I can't blow out a candle through this mask so they're decent for filtering. They're comfortable on my large head. They stand off my face well so they're comfortable even in the Florida heat for long term wearing. The nose bar blocks off enough air that I can get a fair seal and not too much fogging of my glasses. Plus, I like the black better than white or blue. I've worn several so far and not one has failed. Would recommend.
AFUSWNVA72MMWHGYWJ652SYX2JJQ.best_prediction_review:
These are decent basic 3‑ply disposable masks and I like the black color, but for me the whole pass/fail is the nose/cheek seal because I wear glasses and I’m in Florida heat.

Simple test: put it on, shape the nose wire, then exhale hard a few times and see if the air shoots straight up into my lenses. With these I can get an okay seal if I really pinch and mold the wire, but it doesn’t lock in place on my face the way better ones do, so I still get some fogging once I’m moving around.

Comfort is okay for short errands, but in heat it starts to feel warm and a little more “in my face” than I like, and that makes me mess with it more (which defeats the point). As far as basic protection goes I did the quick candle test and I couldn’t blow it out easily with the mask on, so it’s not like air is just blasting straight through.

I’ll use the rest, but if you need a mask that reliably doesn’t fog glasses or stays comfortable in humid heat without constant adjusting, I’ve had better.

AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.product_description: GLYTCH Gaming Energy Supplement Powder | Gamer and Esports Drink Mix for Increased Focus, Stamina, Memory, and Processing Speed | Sugar Free with Vitamins (Rainbow Magik Flavor - 40 Servings)
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.review_text:
I drink energy drinks, pre-work outs, post-work outs, etc some type of caffeinated jolt product every day otherwise I am practically useless. I don't like overly sweet drinks and was worried this one would be. It isn't sweet its just gross. It has this off taste funky sour thing going on. To the point that I couldn't chug it down.

Now one of my work out friends loves it. He thinks its great. So for Him this is like 4 stars. For me its like 1.

No jitters from the 1/2 portion I did take. Price point is similar to other brands and overall packaging is really good.
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.best_prediction_review:
I tried this mostly for late night gaming / “brain is done” work sessions and overall it does what it’s trying to do. One scoop mixes up pretty easily in a shaker bottle and it doesn’t get chalky on me, but you do need a decent amount of water because the flavor is STRONG. The Rainbow Magik taste is like a sweet/candy fruit vibe. Not gross or chemical tasting to me, but if you hate sweet drink mixes you’re probably going to want to dilute it more than the label suggests.

As far as how it feels, I definitely get a cleaner focus/alertness out of it vs just sipping coffee, and I don’t feel as “sloshy” or heavy as I do with an energy drink. I wouldn’t say it turns you into an esports machine (lol) but it helped me stay locked in and not get as mentally tired. Stamina wise it’s more of a steady “keep going” than a huge rush.

A couple notes though: if you’re caffeine sensitive, be careful with timing. I took it too late once and it messed with my sleep. Also it’s sugar free which I like, but you can still tell it has sweeteners, and if you have a sensitive stomach I’d start with half a scoop to see how you do.

Price per serving feels pretty reasonable compared to buying cans, especially since you get 40 servings, but I don’t use it daily so it lasts me awhile. Packaging came in fine and the tub seals like normal. I’d buy again, just probably wouldn’t pick this same flavor next time because it’s a bit much unless I really water it down.

AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.product_description: DoPake Portable Mini Shisha Hookah Set,2 in 1 Eco-Zinc Alloy Material Shisha Portable Hookah
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.review_text: For a one and done its pretty great but for a have on hand water pipe it isn't the best.  Its a bit of a pain to clean.  Also the chamber that holds the herbs/tobacco gets SUPER HOT yeah that it so not great to touch at all.  Also, if you drop this its toast.
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.best_prediction_review:
This is a cute little portable hookah set and it’s definitely more of a “personal/one person” size vs something you’d put out for a group. I got it mostly for the novelty and the fact that it’s small enough to toss in a bag, and that part is accurate.

The zinc alloy pieces feel more solid than the super cheap plastic mini ones I’ve seen. Mine showed up in good shape (no dents/cracks) and it looks decent sitting out.

The make-or-break for me with small smoking devices is whether I’ll actually keep using it once it’s dirty, and this one is kind of a mixed bag. It works, but the small size means it gets messy fast and you’ll be cleaning it more often than a regular setup. Also, after a session the metal parts get hot, so it’s not something I’d be tossing right back into a bag unless you want a melted/dirty surprise.

For someone who wants a tiny travel/personal hookah and doesn’t mind the extra cleanup, it’s fine. If you’re hoping for something low-maintenance or something to pass around with friends, I’d skip and get a larger, easier-to-clean setup.

AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.product_description: Gift Bags

I wouldn't be uncomfortable putting a heavy candle in them and not supporting the bottom with my hand.  IE They can hold that with no trouble.  Super easy to use and look great.  Will be that bag that gets recycled after giving for sure.
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.best_prediction_review:
These are just simple gift bags but they’re nicer in person than the super cheap dollar store ones. The paper isn’t that tissue-thin type and the handles feel securely attached.

My quick test was loading one up with a decent sized candle + a lotion set (awkward weight) and carrying it one-handed from the car into a party without supporting the bottom. No ripping at the handle holes and no seam split, and it didn’t feel like it was about to stretch out and drop.

If you need bags that can handle a “real” gift without you babying it, these passed for me.

AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.product_description: Dose & Co Collagen Protein Powder (Chocolate Fudge) 14.8oz (420g) – Non-GMO, Gluten Free, Sugar Free Collagen Peptides Supplement – 20g of Whey Protein
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.review_text:
This is okay in the flavor department. I like that it has collagen along with protein. I drink a protein shake or add some to a drink daily. This isn't one I will get again. The serving size is "2 heaped tbs" that's useful.

This was listed as chocolate fudge but arrived chocolate and the flavor is similar to that of unsweetened chocolate. Great if you don't care for sweets or chocolate. The chocolate is very mild but there.

Overall just not impressed with this. It did mix well but the flavor was blah and a funky chalk coating after drinking.
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.best_prediction_review:
I’ve tried a handful of collagen/protein powders and this one is pretty easy to live with IF you mix it right.  The chocolate fudge flavor is decent and doesn’t have that weird fake-sweet aftertaste, which was my biggest worry with “sugar free”.  It mixes best in a shaker with cold milk/almond milk.  In plain water it’s drinkable but it tastes thinner and the cocoa comes through more.

Texture wise it’s mostly smooth but this does leave a little bit of that collagen “coating/film” in your mouth after you drink it.  It’s not the worst I’ve had, but it’s enough that I wouldn’t want this as my daily go-to unless I’m mixing it into something thicker (milk, smoothie, etc).  If you’re sensitive to that after-feel, just know it’s there.

Also double check what you get when it arrives.  Mine didn’t match what I thought I was ordering from the listing (flavor/label details were not what I expected) and that’s a big trust issue for me with anything I’m ingesting.  Between that and the mouth-coating, I’m not planning to repurchase even though the actual taste is fine.

AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.product_description: HEETA 12-Pack Bath Bombs Gift Set, Extra Large 4.5Oz with Essential Oils and Bath Salts, Perfect for Spa Bath. Handmade Birthday or Christmas Gifts for Gilrs and Boys
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.review_text: These are wonderful.  I love bath bomb and often they are over scented or just don't do much.  This set is a perfect balance.  The various scents are wonderful and mild.  You don't feel like you are inside a perfume shop.  They are oversized, if you have a large tub one is plenty.  They dissolve very well and didn't leave a chalky film in the tub.  My skin was moisturized and very pampered.  My guy even liked them in the tub!  Presented in a nice box with each bomb wrapped in plastic and additionally wrapped in a paper with a label indicating the scent.
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.best_prediction_review:
These are BIG bath bombs. They’re the 4.5oz kind, not the little ones that fizz for 30 seconds and vanish. I’ve used a few now and the main thing I cared about was: do they dissolve cleanly or do they leave a waxy/oily ring and grit all over the tub.

So far they’ve been a pass for me. Each one had a steady fizz for a good while, the water felt softer, and when I drained the tub I didn’t have that annoying film stuck around the water line or a bunch of junk sitting on the bottom that I had to scrub off. That’s the “will I keep using these” test in my house.

Scent-wise they’re there but not overpowering once they hit the water (I prefer that). I also like that this is actually a usable gift set: you get 12, they’re individually wrapped, and you can tell the scents apart without guessing. If you want super strong fragrance that fills the whole bathroom, these might feel mild, but for an actual relaxing bath without extra cleanup, I’d buy them again.

AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.product_description: Pine Gel Nail Polish Set 9 Colors Green Purple Pink Glitter with Base No Wipe Glossy Top Matte Top Coat Soak Off UV Gel 12 Pcs
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.review_text:
I am really liking the Pine Polish more and more. You get 12 bottles in this set, do note that the count includes the 1 bottle of Base coat, the 1 bottle of Top coat, and the 1 bottle of Matte top coat. So in reality you get 9 colors and of those 9, 3 are in glitter colors.

The bottles are decent in size and the polish spreads nicely. You can be generous and put on a thick single coat and pretty much get full coverage. Set times don't vary from any other brand I have used.

Scent (nail polish scent) is not more pronounced then other brands. These colors are very vibrant and jewel tone like. Really good set.
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.best_prediction_review:
This gel set is a nice little at-home kit IF you already have a UV/LED lamp. You get 9 colors (greens/purples/pinks + a couple glitters) plus a base, a no-wipe glossy top, and a matte top, so you can actually finish a manicure without digging for extra coats.

Pigment/coverage is the win here. Most of the creams cover solid with one thicker coat (2 thin coats if you’re picky). The glitters look best if you kind of pat/float them on instead of brushing like normal polish.

Not every shade is equal though. A couple of the lighter/pastel tones take more work to look even, and one of the purples in my set looked better in the bottle than on the nail. Nothing unusable, just don’t expect every color to be a “favorite.”

Also, check what you actually received. The listing/box wording made it sound like “12 colors” at a glance, but it’s 9 colors + the 3 coats (base/glossy/matte). Mine arrived correct, just calling it out so nobody is surprised.

Finish-wise, the glossy top cures hard and shiny but it does leave a slight tacky/film feel if you don’t cure it long enough (especially around the cuticle edges), so do a full cure and wipe your edges before you call it done. Overall, it works as intended and is easy enough to use once you figure out the glitter application.

AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.product_description: Set of 12 Gift Bags - Non-Woven Reusable Shiny Bags with Glitter Texture for Weddings, Birthdays, Party, Includes 12xThank You Hangtags, White Twine & 12 Cardboard Inserts- 8x4x9.7” Size (Mix Color)
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.review_text: These are pretty sturdy little bags.  They are strong enough to support a book without the bottom falling out.  They aren't overly thick but for standard gifts most or many items will fit in these.  The Rose Gold color and Silver are much attractive then the regular gold one. Pretty handy set to keep for last minute wrapping needs.
AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.best_prediction_review:
These are cute gift bags and the size is actually useful (not the tiny favor-bag size). I fit a small lotion, a couple makeup items and some candy with room to spare. The cardboard bottom insert matters — once that’s in, the bag doesn’t sag and it feels a lot more stable.

The non-woven material is what you’d expect for party bags, but it’s not flimsy. I loaded one up with a heavier candle and it held, BUT I wouldn’t trust these for anything really heavy unless you’re supporting the bottom while you carry it. The glitter texture looks nice and I didn’t have glitter shedding all over my table, which was my main worry.

You get the thank-you tags and twine in the set, so it’s actually ready to use. For the price point and for light/medium gifts these are a solid buy and I’d use them again.

AEOK4TQIKGO23SJKZ6PW4FETNNDA_1.product_description: 100% Organic Cotton Moisturizing Eczema Gloves for Dry Sensitive Skin - 6 Pairs
